MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Joanna Kozubal, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party; no other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Fjeld Family Limited Partnership's Motion For Discovery Sanctions Against Defendant Veni Vikki, Inc. is granted as it seeks terminating sanctions against the corporate entity, Veni Vikki, Inc. The answer of the corporate entity, Veni Vikki, Inc. is ordered stricken and default entered. Issue sanctions are denied. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR.
